nodes.label:
Phase 1: Establish Secure Channel
(Main Mode or Aggressive Mode)

visuals.title: IPsec Transport Mode Packet Structure
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">IP Security Overview</text>
  
  <!-- Main IP Security Box -->
  <rect x="110" y="60" width="200" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    IP Security (IPsec)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Authentication Header -->
  <rect x="80" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="140" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    AH
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Encapsulating Security Payload -->
  <rect x="220" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ESP
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Transport Mode -->
  <rect x="80" y="220" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="140" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Transport Mode
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Tunnel Mode -->
  <rect x="220" y="220" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tunnel Mode
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows connecting main IPsec to protocols -->
  <line x1="210" y1="120" x2="210" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Arrows connecting protocols to modes -->
  <line x1="140" y1="190" x2="140" y2="220" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="280" y1="190" x2="280" y2="220" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="140" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Authentication Header
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="280" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Encapsulating Security Payload
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="140" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    End-to-End Protection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="280" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Gateway-to-Gateway Protection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
